title: NBER US Business Cycle Expansions and Contractions
recommended_usage: Map regime turns to historical recession start/end dates. Use peak/trough dates to anchor Major recession_onset and global_crash events.
notes: Download the Excel or JSON version from NBER and place at local_path.

title: EIA Petroleum & Other Liquids — Spot Prices
recommended_usage: Identify historical oil price spikes (>20% in a quarter) to ground commodity-shock and oil_price_spike events.
notes: Download the XLS workbook and place at local_path.

title: Federal Reserve — Monetary Policy Press Releases (RSS/XML)
recommended_usage: Extract FOMC decision dates and rate-change direction for rate_hike / rate_cut events.
notes: Save the XML feed and place at local_path. The feed contains recent items; for historical depth you may need to supplement from FRED.

title: ECB Monetary Policy Decisions (RSS/XML)
recommended_usage: European rate decisions. Pair with Fed data for global-policy events.
notes: Save the XML feed and place at local_path.
licensing_note: ECB public data; check reuse terms.

title: Bureau of Labor Statistics — CPI Historical Data
recommended_usage: Compute month-over-month and year-over-year CPI changes to detect inflation surprises (>0.5% MoM or >5% YoY).
notes: Download annual archive ZIP or individual series files and place at local_path.

title: NY Fed — Financial Crisis Timeline (2007–09)
recommended_usage: Reference for Major banking_panic and emergency_policy_intervention events during the GFC. Extract key date milestones.
notes: Download the PDF and place at local_path. Will need manual or scripted extraction.

title: Council on Foreign Relations — Global Conflict Tracker
recommended_usage: Use as a research reference when manually curating war_escalation events. Do NOT scrape or call at runtime.
notes: External reference only. Browse for context, then hand-write event records into historical_events.json.
licensing_note: Copyrighted. Reference only; do not redistribute content.

title: IMF — Primary Commodity Prices
recommended_usage: Cross-reference commodity price moves when curating events. Do NOT call at runtime.
licensing_note: IMF terms of use apply. Reference only.
